film.title: Padosan
film.overview: A simple man from a village falls in love with his new neighbor. He enlists the help of his musical-theater friends to woo the lovely girl-next-door away from her music teacher.

dialogues.dialogue: oh, my god, a mermaid! oh! you'd cast this line to catch a mermaid, had you? I came to catch some fish. - he looks like a shameless guy. shameless? me? you're the shameless ones. I'm fully dressed.

oh! you'd cast this line to catch a mermaid, had you? I came to catch some fish. - he looks like a shameless guy. shameless? me? you're the shameless ones. I'm fully dressed. but you're practically naked in the water.

I came to catch some fish. - he looks like a shameless guy. shameless? me? you're the shameless ones. I'm fully dressed. but you're practically naked in the water. girls, I think he's destined to die in the water.
bindu, here I am. what can I do for you? Do tell me. shame on you. go drown yourself. Do you see this, Guru? Look up. why are you so low today?

Do you see this, Guru? Look up. why are you so low today? you allowed a girl to slap you. aren't you ashamed? you may as well wear a dress and sit at home. you've demeaned the panchratna theatre company.

don't you dare. don't think I'm a coward. I can hold a girl's hand. I'm 26 years old, you know. you sure are proud of it. why not? look what's written here. it says - up to the age of 25 a man should be a bachelor.
